required_skills: Learning Experience Design (LXD) combining instructional design with UX principles
Human-Centered Design (HCD) applied to educational product and course development
Learner journey mapping and persona development for diverse learner populations
Interaction design and prototype development for digital learning environments
Learning outcome definition and competency framework development
Multimedia learning theory including Mayer's Principles of Multimedia Instruction
Usability testing and iterative design for eLearning products
Accessibility standards compliance including WCAG 2.1 and Section 508 for learning content
preferred_skills: Motion graphics and visual storytelling for educational video and animation
Conversational AI and chatbot integration in learning pathways
Xylophone cross-platform responsive design for mobile-first learning experiences
Learning analytics interpretation to refine and personalize learner journeys
Immersive learning design including AR/VR-based simulations and experiential modules
Design thinking facilitation for collaborative curriculum co-creation with stakeholders
Behavioral science and nudge theory applied to learner engagement and habit formation
frameworks: Mayer's Cognitive Theory of Multimedia Learning
responsibilities: Architect end-to-end learner journeys by mapping touchpoints, emotional states, and knowledge milestones across a complete learning experience
Apply Human-Centered Design methodologies to conduct learner research, synthesize insights, and ideate innovative solutions to educational challenges
Design high-fidelity interactive prototypes for eLearning modules, digital courses, and blended learning programs using Figma and Articulate Storyline
Collaborate with SMEs, product managers, and visual designers to translate complex subject matter into engaging, learner-centric digital experiences
Develop comprehensive learner personas and empathy maps that inform content sequencing, tone, scaffolding, and assessment design decisions
Conduct usability testing and learner feedback sessions on course prototypes, iterating designs based on qualitative and quantitative findings
Integrate accessibility best practices (WCAG 2.1, UDL) into every stage of the design process to ensure inclusive learning for diverse audiences
Define and track learning experience KPIs including completion rates, engagement time, assessment scores, and learner satisfaction NPS
Design formative and summative assessment experiences that are authentic, scenario-based, and aligned with real-world performance outcomes
Establish and maintain a design system for learning products, ensuring visual and interaction consistency across all modules and platforms
